Danaya has babysitting experience with ages 2-5 and is pursuing a teaching career. She lives in Griffin, GA, with a 35-minute drive radius, and is available part-time around her school schedule.

Hi, my name is Ania guider and I have a little bit experience in child care. I used to do a lot of babysitting when I was younger. So I'm used to working with ages like to to like five and I like working with kids because I feel like you can still teach them when they're not in school. I was in like Big Brother Big Sister when I was younger and I learned a lot from that. I feel like being a school teacher or someone that works with kids can help them grow and learn more.
I live in Griffin, Georgia and I am willing to travel 30-35 minutes for a job.
As of now, I am part-time looking for part-time work because I can only work Tuesday, Thursday, Tuesday, and Thursday, since I'm in school Monday, Wednesday and Friday. Thank you.

I have dealt with conflict between children by seeing what the issue is first, then finding out what the problem is, separating the kids, and making sure they don't stay apart for too long until they learn to apologize to each other. Usually takes about 10 minutes.
I will make a great UpKid teacher because I love working with kids. I really want to be a teacher when I graduate school, that's my main goal. Long term I want to be an elementary school teacher.
